name: Watermark

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Text tiled as the repeating watermark, rendered via a rotated SVG mask over the host's current text color. Ignored when Image is set.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: Optional image URL to tile as the watermark instead of Text. When set, the image is repeated edge-to-edge; ImageWidth/ImageHeight control each tile's size and Opacity dims it. Takes precedence over Text when both are provided.

parameters.name: ImageWidth
parameters.description: Tile width in px for the Image watermark. Default 120.

parameters.name: ImageHeight
parameters.description: Tile height in px for the Image watermark. Default 64.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The content the watermark overlay is stamped on top of.

parameters.name: Rotation
parameters.description: Rotation in degrees applied to the text watermark tile. Defaults to -22.

parameters.name: Gap
parameters.description: Spacing in pixels between repeated text watermark tiles. Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: FontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels of the text watermark. Defaults to 14.

parameters.name: Opacity
parameters.description: Opacity of the watermark overlay, from 0 to 1. Defaults to 0.1.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer wrapper.

examples.title: Basic Watermark
examples.code:
<Watermark Text="Confidential">
    <Stack Gap="4" Class="p-8">
        <Lumeo.Text Color="foreground">This document contains sensitive information.</Lumeo.Text>
    </Stack>
</Watermark>

examples.title: Custom Settings
examples.code:
<Watermark Text="DRAFT" Rotation="-30" FontSize="20" Opacity="0.15" Gap="120">
    <Stack Gap="2" Class="p-8">
        <Heading Level="3" Size="lg">Draft Document</Heading>
        <Lumeo.Text Color="muted">This is a work in progress.</Lumeo.Text>
    </Stack>
</Watermark>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The content the watermark overlay is stamped on top of.

mdSummary:
# Watermark

Repeating diagonal watermark overlay.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Cards & Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/watermark

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Watermark | Text | `string?` | `` | Text tiled as the repeating watermark, rendered via a rotated SVG mask over the host's current text color. Ignored when Image is set. |
| Watermark | Image | `string?` | `` | Optional image URL to tile as the watermark instead of Text. When set, the image is repeated edge-to-edge; ImageWidth/ImageHeight control each tile's size and Opacity dims it. Takes precedence over Text when both are provided. |
| Watermark | ImageWidth | `int` | `120` | Tile width in px for the Image watermark. Default 120. |
| Watermark | ImageHeight | `int` | `64` | Tile height in px for the Image watermark. Default 64. |
| Watermark | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The content the watermark overlay is stamped on top of. |
| Watermark | Rotation | `int` | `-22` | Rotation in degrees applied to the text watermark tile. Defaults to -22. |
| Watermark | Gap | `int` | `100` | Spacing in pixels between repeated text watermark tiles. Defaults to 100. |
| Watermark | FontSize | `int` | `14` | Font size in pixels of the text watermark. Defaults to 14. |
| Watermark | Opacity | `double` | `0.1` | Opacity of the watermark overlay, from 0 to 1. Defaults to 0.1. |
| Watermark | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer wrapper. |
| Watermark | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer wrapper. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Watermark) — The content the watermark overlay is stamped on top of.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Watermark />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Watermark/Watermark.razor`
